capabilities_used.evidence: 多张图都围绕价格与关键均线的关系做判断：图4 BTC 在价格重新站上两条均线附近后发图；图7 SOL 爆量上冲前沿着白色均线抬升；图8 ETH 也是沿短期均线拉升。推文 [2025-03-24]：“Pretty strong signal seeing the reflippening of 20/200 and price over both — historically a pretty great place to take risk.”

这是他最明确、最高频的框架之一。推文 [2025-03-24] 直接把“20/200 reflippening + price over both”定义为“historically a pretty great place to take risk”；推文 [2026-01-31]：“Eth and Sol and below 200 week average. Historically good buy zones.” 图1、图4、图5、图8 都明显标出长短周期均线并围绕收复/失守展开。
他偏好在趋势确认后做风险暴露，而不是猜底。推文 [2024-07-28]：“Majors look like they want to melt up”；[2025-05-21]：“Things are looking Up”；图7、图8 都是突破后顺势跟进的表达，而非底部抄刀。
他会用均线失守与结构走弱来定义熊市/弱势，而不是只看单根K。图5 BTC 价格明显位于白色均线下方，白线下弯，呈现弱势趋势状态；[2026-01-31] 也把“跌到/跌破 200 week average”当成熊市极限买区的背景。
推文 [2024-09-25]：“Six months in a large range after markup. Going into election, annual seasonality. Interesting.” 图1 SOL 周线也用多条水平线框定长期箱体/大区间，明显在用区间结构理解行情。
图1 SOL 周线把 150.36、78.04 以及更低几个虚线位都画成区间层级，更像是在做箱体边界和中继区的反应交易，而不只是单点目标。其表达风格偏“到位反应”而非纯追突破。

推文 [2024-07-31]：“The ETFs are being underestimated.”；[2024-03-28]：“Bought IBIT in the degen Ira. First time doing one of the spot ETFs. Feels good.”；[2024-07-22]：“Amazed y’all are gonna run the exact playbook on eth as btc for the etf” 说明他把 ETF 叙事/资金流当作核心催化。
推文 [2026-01-30]：“Multi year DXY lows, new fed chair, metals record highs. Crypto got their guy in the White House. This is bitcoin.” 这是典型把 DXY 弱势作为 BTC 顺风背景。
同一条 [2026-01-30] 把“metals record highs”与比特币并列，说明他会观察黄金/白银等宏观避险或货币化资产的联动；[2026-01-26]：“Bitcoin has a lot of catching up to do. Silver and gold have been straight vertical.”
他的表达经常带周期视角和季节性。推文 [2024-09-25] 把“大区间 + election + annual seasonality”放在一起讨论；[2026-01-31] 又用 200 周均线历史买区框架判断熊市低点区域，本质上是周期位置判断。
虽然没有直接说“四年周期”，但他频繁使用“historically good buy zones”“bear market lows”这种跨周期样本语言，尤其 [2026-01-31] 用 200 周均线和熊市低点历史对照，明显是四年大周期视角的交易员。
他的入场话术不是‘这里一定到底’，而是‘price over both’‘great place to take risk’，即先等确认再出手。图4、图8 都是等价格重新站回关键均线后再表达看多，不是下跌中盲接。
推文 [2025-08-25]：“People seem to forget about bloody Monday in bull markets.” 说明他意识到牛市中也有高波动洗盘，属于对波动 regime 的经验提醒。

他不仅看 BTC，也频繁观察 ETH、SOL、XRP 等 majors/alt rotation。推文 [2026-04-11]：“XRP = AN OUTPERFORMER IN A BITCOIN BEAR MARKET DUE TO ITS LACK OF PRICE CORRELATION WITH OTHER CRYPTOS”；[2024-07-28]：“Majors look like they want to melt up” 体现他会做主流币轮动比较。
虽然 seed 定义是 50/200 金叉，但他的常用版本显然是 20/200。推文 [2025-03-24] 明确提到“reflippening of 20/200”；图表也普遍只挂两条核心均线，用均线翻转做大级别风险开关。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: 20W/200W Reflip
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Price reclaims both the fast 20-week moving average and the slow 200-week moving average, often after a corrective phase; trader treats the reclaim as a historically favorable point to add risk.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 价格在回调后同时重新站上 20 周均线和 200 周均线，把这种“双均线重夺”视为历史上较优的风险暴露窗口。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 推文 [2025-03-24]：“Pretty strong signal seeing the reflippening of 20/200 and price over both — historically a pretty great place to take risk.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: 200-Week Mean Reversion Buy Zone
new_capabilities_proposed.description: When major crypto assets tag or fall slightly below the 200-week moving average, trader treats the zone as a statistically strong long-term accumulation area.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 当主流币触及或略微跌破 200 周均线时，将其视为长期统计意义上的优质吸筹区。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 推文 [2026-01-31]：“Eth and Sol and below 200 week average. Historically good buy zones. Bitcoin would have to go sub $60k...”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Post-Markup Box Consolidation
new_capabilities_proposed.description: After an impulsive markup phase, price spends months in a broad horizontal box; trader reads it as digestion before the next directional move, especially when paired with seasonality or catalysts.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 价格在一轮快速上涨后进入持续数月的大箱体整理，交易员将其视为下一波方向选择前的消化阶段，常结合季节性或事件催化判断。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 推文 [2024-09-25]：“Six months in a large range after markup. Going into election, annual seasonality. Interesting.” 图1 也是明显的上涨后大箱体。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Alt Relative Strength During BTC Weakness
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 比特币弱势期的山寨相对强度
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Identify assets that decouple from BTC and outperform during BTC drawdowns or bear phases; used as rotation candidates when broad crypto beta is weak.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 识别在 BTC 回撤或熊市阶段与 BTC 脱钩、保持相对强势的币种，作为弱市轮动标的。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 推文 [2026-04-11]：“XRP = AN OUTPERFORMER IN A BITCOIN BEAR MARKET DUE TO ITS LACK OF PRICE CORRELATION WITH OTHER CRYPTOS”

personal_quirks.quote: Pretty strong signal seeing the reflippening of 20/200 and price over both — historically a pretty great place to take risk.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先等价格重新站上双关键均线，再扩大风险敞口；他偏好确认后的趋势风险，而不是主观抄底。

personal_quirks.quote: Eth and Sol and below 200 week average. Historically good buy zones.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 把 200 周均线视作主流币深度价值锚点，极端回撤到这里反而进入长期配置区。

personal_quirks.quote: Six months in a large range after markup. Going into election, annual seasonality. Interesting.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他会把箱体整理放进更大的宏观/季节性时钟里解读，而不是孤立看图。

personal_quirks.quote: People seem to forget about bloody Monday in bull markets.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 即使是牛市也要预留对剧烈回撤和流动性踩踏的心理与仓位准备。

personal_quirks.quote: Don’t forget you are always trading for more buying power. That is the only target.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 交易目标不是喊单正确，而是提升净购买力；本质是资金曲线导向而不是观点导向。

unique_traits: 他不是纯图形派，而是把大级别均线框架、箱体结构、季节性和宏观变量混合在一起做中周期判断。和很多只会画支撑阻力的 TA 账户不同，他尤其强调 20/200、200 周均线这种跨周期统计锚点，并且明显偏好在确认后的趋势中加风险。与此同时，他对 ETF、DXY、金属和主流币相对强弱都有持续关注，因此更像“会画图的宏观 swing trader”，而不是单纯的图表内容号。

high_conviction_phrases: one of the nicest charts I’ve ever seen
historically a pretty great place to take risk
majors look like they want to melt up
low_conviction_phrases: if we could send all our bags
